# Upload Checklist — SIX THINKERS: DIALOGUES

## YouTube (16:9)
- Video: `video/first-round-16x9.mp4`
- Description: `dist/captions/youtube.txt`
- Or run: `python -m kd.publish dialogues/001-first-round --target youtube`

## TikTok / Reels / Shorts (9:16)
- Video: `video/first-round-9x16.mp4`
- Caption: `dist/captions/tiktok.txt`
- Upload manually via each platform's app / creator studio.

## Instagram Feed (1:1)
- Video: `video/first-round-1x1.mp4`
- Caption: `dist/captions/instagram.txt`

## X / Twitter
- Video: `video/first-round-1x1.mp4`
- Post text: `dist/captions/x.txt`

## Substack
- Embed snippet: `video/embed.substack.html`
- Or run: `python -m kd.publish dialogues/001-first-round --target substack`
